expectations.text: Proceeded without Gate A because audience + differentiator were supplied
expectations.evidence: The response immediately produced value proposition options with no gating questions, proceeding directly to output given the supplied audience (busy parents) and differentiators (5 minutes, no ultra-processed ingredients).

expectations.text: Produced an outcome-led, specific value proposition
expectations.evidence: Option 2 reads: 'We help busy parents feed their families real food every night, even on the nights there's no time to cook' — outcome-led and specific to the audience's situation.

expectations.text: Is differentiated enough to pass the 'only this brand could say it' test
expectations.evidence: The note explains 'No ultra-processed ingredients does double duty: it differentiates from fast food and ready-meal competitors, and signals trust to health-conscious parents,' confirming brand-specific differentiation.
